title: ミイラハント～最恐スイート・マミー～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the rehearsal for the mummy hunt. It
seems the students who aren't working as event
staff are going to play the role of guests.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Kay, time to get into positions. I haven't seen
Creek since she said she was goin' to prep her
costume... Guess she didn't make it in time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We'll just join up with her later... I'm kinda
worried about her, though. She hasn't been
herself lately. Probably strugglin' with that no
coddlin' rule...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama, Inari... It's on.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gruhhh! GiVe iT bACk... GivE baCK Da
tReasuRrRrRe!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: EEEEEK! Nooo! Stay away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Get behind me. It's time for a temporary retreat.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: O-okay... Captain Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What the—"Captain"?! What're they callin' her that for?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ha! She's a seasoned hunter now! But we're not
goin' down without a fight!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, so is Oguri on this floor? ...Or the one
below?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Now! Bang!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yesss! One down! Nice shot, Captain Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Tama... I blew it. It's all up to you now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Can't believe ya ambushed us from below like
that. It was a close one, but I barely managed to
dodge.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This is the end of the road for you too, Tama. I'll
have my sights on your back the moment you turn
to run. And this time, I won't miss!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Ahahaha! This isn't over yet! Take a look
behind ya!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehe. ♪ Fouuund youuu! ♪ "Mummy" is here
for a cuddle! Just come into my arms and close
your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Get 'er, Creek! Drag Oguri into an endless
slumber!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Just play dead! Whatever happens, just
stay still and pretend you're dead!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ There, there. "Mummy" won't bite, so
you can just sleep tight. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri, dear? ...Goodness, she's dozed right off.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Tamtam. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's the hold up? Hurry up and take her outta
commission alr—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's get you changed, Tamtam! I've got a mummy
costume for you right here. Don't worry, I'll help
you put it on. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't need any costume! Hey! Don't take yer
eyes off Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehehehe! ♪ Oh, would you look at the
time? It's costume o'clock! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why're ya comin' after me?! You just wanna
coddle someone, don'tcha!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Looks like the tables have turned!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Creek! Behind ya! Oguri's back in action! Catch
her and coddle the life outta her!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: All riiight. ♪ Hehehe, I've got a hug with your name on it, Oguri! Squeeze! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I... messed up...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I've had so much practice makin' snappy
comebacks that my reflexes are super sharp! Not
too shabby, if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... You played me like a fiddle... To think
you'd sic Creek on me like that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Creek, you were terrifying! Guess that's what happens when ya can't coddle anyone, huh? Still, that was some real mummy energy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya both brought a lot of personality to yer roles.
No doubt this mummy hunt is gonna be a
bona-fide success!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Time to end this!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Look out, Creek! ...Yowch!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam! You took the hit for me?! B-b-but...
why?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sacrificing yourself to save your fellow mummy...
You're the best friend anyone could ask for,
Tama.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ungh, Tamtam... I'm so sorry. Don't fret... We'll be
together again soon...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mummy Tama... Your valor will not be forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Do we really need this melodrama?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the mummies get wiped out, and the mummy
hunt goes on to receive critical acclaim for being
such an emotional haunted house experience.
